Macterm

NSApplication
public.app-category.developer-tools
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to use AppleScript.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to use Bluetooth.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to access your calendar.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to use the camera.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to access your contacts.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to access the local network.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to access your location information.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to use your microphone.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to access motion data.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to access your photo library.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to access your reminders.
A process running in Macterm's terminal would like to use speech recognition.
A process running in Macterm's terminal requires elevated privileges.
https://thdxg.github.io/macterm/appcast.xml
